release_notes: Stream schema 'Landing + Offer' now works with a landing only: a selected landing is always used as the destination even when no offer is attached, so removing the offer no longer breaks the landing. Added Keitaro-compatible landing-to-offer transition: place Offer in a local landing and the tracker redirects the visitor to the offer bound to their click (with macro substitution); a specific offer can be targeted via /?_lp=1&offer_id=10. (Local landings also required the /landings path fix from 0.9.3.2.)
